title: Tools to boost productivity
body:
We can always squeeze minutes out of small things we do every day.

**Some of the tools I use to save time and spare myself headaches** (online and free)**:**

-   [**Toggl**](https://toggl.com/)  
    To track the time I spend on each task, project and client. Very easy to use and very helpful when it comes to accounting for the minutes you've spent on each thing.
-   **[Calendy](https://calendly.com/xarop/)**  
    No need to look at the "gaps" in your calendar. This tool connects to your Google Calendar and sees what hours are available. Ideal for scheduling meetings with clients and/or collaborators.
-   **[Github](https://github.com/xarop/)**  
    I've gotten used to using Git in any development, no matter how small. A way to always have version control and *backups* of everything.
-   **[Figma](https://www.figma.com/)**  
    A great tool for UI/UX design. Perfect for both editing and generating *wireframes* and prototypes that you can share with clients and/or collaborators.
